---
title: "Creative Portfolio"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    toc-depth: 3
    number-sections: false
    smooth-scroll: true
    embed-resources: false
    title-block-banner: true
    theme: ../theme.scss
---

```{=html}
<style>
#TOC {
  background: url("assets/generic_img.png");
  background-size: 80%;
  background-position: center 1rem;
  padding-top: 200px !important;
  background-repeat: no-repeat;
}

.browser-preview {
  margin: 2rem 0 0;
  border: 1px solid #d7dde2;
  border-radius: 18px;
  overflow: hidden;
  background: #f7f3ed;
  box-shadow: 0 24px 60px rgba(32, 41, 48, 0.16);
}

.browser-preview__bar {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
  gap: 1rem;
  padding: 0.9rem 1rem;
  background: linear-gradient(180deg, #fbfaf8 0%, #efe7df 100%);
  border-bottom: 1px solid #d7dde2;
}

.browser-preview__dots {
  display: flex;
  gap: 0.45rem;
}

.browser-preview__dots span {
  width: 0.75rem;
  height: 0.75rem;
  border-radius: 999px;
  display: inline-block;
}

.browser-preview__dots span:nth-child(1) {
  background: #ff8d7a;
}

.browser-preview__dots span:nth-child(2) {
  background: #f5c76a;
}

.browser-preview__dots span:nth-child(3) {
  background: #88c7a3;
}

.browser-preview__address {
  flex: 1;
  max-width: 520px;
  margin: 0 auto;
  padding: 0.55rem 1rem;
  border-radius: 999px;
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.9);
  border: 1px solid #ddd5cd;
  color: #55626d;
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  line-height: 1;
  text-align: center;
}

.browser-preview__viewport {
  height: min(70vh, 900px);
  overflow-y: auto;
  background: #f2ede7;
}

.browser-preview__viewport img {
  display: block;
  width: 100%;
  height: auto;
}

.browser-preview__caption {
  margin-top: 0.85rem;
  color: #55626d;
  font-size: 0.95rem;
}

</style>
```

Congrats! You've made it to the most exciting part of my website: my creative work! This page will be a collection of projects I've worked on that are more design focused. Some of them are personal projects, while others are pieces of larger professional and academic work I can't help but add a creative touch too.

### Web Design

My first experience with web design was learning HTML to personalize my Tumblr blog in middle school. While I have no plans to share that (embarrassing), I have continued to develop my web design skills in various projects, including building this website hosted on Github Pages. I typically use a combination of R Quarto, HTML, CSS, R Shiny, and JavaScript. I also have built sites using WordPress and Squarespace.

Eventually, I'd love to build interactive, scrollable web-based visualization for data storytelling in the style of [The Pudding](https://pudding.cool/) and the [New York Times](https://www.nytimes.com/interactive/2025/12/22/us/2025-year-in-graphics.html). I am currently learning Svelte and D3.js, and I hope to be able to feature projects using those tools here soon.

```{=html}
<div class="browser-preview">
  <div class="browser-preview__bar">
    <div class="browser-preview__dots" aria-hidden="true">
      <span></span>
      <span></span>
      <span></span>
    </div>
    <div class="browser-preview__address">babychildteenatnyu.com</div>
  </div>
  <div class="browser-preview__viewport">
    <img src="assets/bct-website.png" alt="Scrollable preview of the BabyChildTeen@NYU website design.">
  </div>
</div>
<p class="browser-preview__caption">A preview of the BabyChildTeen@NYU website built on Squarespace.</p>
```
